name: Apple Bread Pudding 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine bread cubes, raisins, and apples in a large bowl.
2. Add water or milk and sugar to the mixture. Stir until combined.
3. Let the mixture stand for 20-30 minutes.
4. Beat the egg whites until foamy. Stir into the mixture along with cinnamon and vanilla.
5. Pour the batter into a sprayed 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
6. Bake uncovered at 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 60 minutes, or until set and lightly browned.
